S.FORM: == 1. teka 開場 == u pauzipay ci malataw i pabaway ci dungi i bayuan ci kabid i buyu'an ci kadabuwang
S.PHON: == *. təka ** == u pauzipaj ʦi mar~ɾataw i pabawaj ʦi duŋi i bajuan ʦi kabid i bujuʔ~ʡan ʦi kadabuwaŋ
